name: cloudotp
description: Cloudflare Workers + D1 edition of TOTP Share Dashboard

scripts.dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.local.jsonc && wrangler dev --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote

DB.description: D1 database used for members, encrypted TOTP secrets, categories, and access logs.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Initial administrator password. Use at least 12 random characters.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random session-signing key. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Random encryption key for TOTP secrets. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32` and keep a backup; changing it makes saved secrets unreadable.
